/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libgo2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/go2_interface/msg/detail/camera_gimbal_cmd__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/camera_mode__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_modes__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_light__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_volume__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/mybotshop/build/go2_interface:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libgo2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
